messages.content: como digo "inspirada en esto, he sembrado en mí el objetivo the promotion of economic policies that foster growth of our country and drive meaningful reforms in Ecuador´s company and tax laws" EN INGLES
Inspired by this, I have planted within myself the objective of promoting economic policies that stimulate the growth of our country and drive meaningful reforms in Ecuador's corporate and tax laws.

what do you think of this as a conclusion for a letter of motivation: Inspired by these, I have planted within myself the objective of promoting economic policies that stimulate the growth of my country and drive meaningful reforms in Ecuador´s company and tax laws. I believe that I will be able to make this possible, as during my years of experience I have been able to make a strong network of contacts, however I know that I need to develop a comprehensive understanding of economics to transform this vision into a concrete plan of action. That is why, I have decided to pursue a master´s degree that will serve as a basis to understand the complex issues that arise when legal frameworks interact with the economic factor, and that will not only enrich me academically with new methodologies and study practices, but also allow me to get to know different cultures, through which I will be able to expand my vision of the world, and the cultural contexts that inhabit it. All these characteristics are what I have seen in the EMLE program, a very complete program that meets my professional and personal expectations, and that I am sure will give me the foundations to reach my professional goal, which is to bring corporate law in Ecuador to a more sustainable place. 

The EMLE program ticks all the boxes, and that I am sure will give me the foundations to reach my professional goal, which is to bring corporate law in Ecuador to a more sustainable place.

Your conclusion is well-written and effectively conveys your motivation and goals. It expresses your determination to promote economic policies, drive reforms in company and tax laws, and highlights your network of contacts as well as your recognition of the need for a comprehensive understanding of economics. Mentioning your decision to pursue a master's degree and the specific program you have chosen adds credibility to your aspirations. Moreover, your reference to the EMLE program as being comprehensive and meeting your professional and personal expectations reinforces your commitment to achieving your goal of bringing corporate law in Ecuador to a more sustainable place. Overall, it is a strong conclusion that effectively summarizes your letter of motivation.
will you add something to it?

Certainly! Here's an additional sentence that you can consider adding to your conclusion:

"I am confident that the combination of theoretical knowledge, practical skills, and cultural exposure offered by the EMLE program will equip me with the necessary tools to address the complex challenges faced by our country's legal and economic systems, and ultimately contribute to the advancement of sustainable corporate practices in Ecuador."

This sentence emphasizes the value and potential impact of the EMLE program in preparing you to tackle the challenges faced by legal and economic systems in your country. It showcases your confidence in the program's ability to provide you with well-rounded knowledge and skills to promote sustainable corporate practices.
what is practical skills?

Practical skills typically refer to the abilities and competencies that can be applied directly in real-world situations. In the context of your conclusion, practical skills would include the ability to analyze complex legal or economic issues, develop and implement strategic plans, negotiate effectively, conduct research, draft legal documents, and navigate various aspects of the business and legal landscape. These skills are often gained through hands-on experiences, internships, practical coursework, or professional development opportunities. By mentioning practical skills, you are indicating your desire to acquire not only theoretical knowledge but also the ability to apply that knowledge effectively in practical settings.
can you use another word rather than necessary tools

Certainly! Instead of using "necessary tools," you can consider using the phrase "essential skills and resources" to convey a similar meaning. Here's the revised sentence:

"I am confident that the combination of theoretical knowledge, practical skills, and cultural exposure offered by the EMLE program will equip me with the essential skills and resources to address the complex challenges faced by our country's legal and economic systems, and ultimately contribute to the advancement of sustainable corporate practices in Ecuador."
another word rather than equip me, tools and skills

Certainly! Here's the revised sentence with alternative word choices:

"With the comprehensive theoretical knowledge, practical expertise, and cultural exposure offered by the EMLE program, I am confident that I will be well-prepared to tackle the intricate challenges posed by our country's legal and economic systems, thus making meaningful contributions towards the advancement of sustainable corporate practices in Ecuador."

In this version, "well-prepared" replaces "equip me," "expertise" replaces "skills," and "meaningful contributions" replaces "essential resources." These changes maintain the meaning of the sentence while offering alternative word choices.
do you have something to correct regarding grammar in my parrapraph?

Your paragraph has excellent grammar overall, but I can suggest a few minor corrections:

"I believe that I will be able to make this possible, as during my years of experience, I have been able to build a strong network of contacts. However, I know that I need to develop a comprehensive understanding of economics to transform this vision into a concrete plan of action. That is why I have decided to pursue a master's degree that will serve as a foundation to understand the complex issues that arise when legal frameworks interact with the economic factor. This degree will not only enrich me academically with new methodologies and study practices, but also allow me to explore different cultures, thus expanding my vision of the world and the cultural contexts that inhabit it. All of these characteristics are what I have observed in the EMLE program, a comprehensive program that meets my professional and personal expectations. I am confident that it will provide me with the foundations necessary to reach my professional goal: to bring corporate law in Ecuador to a more sustainable place."

In this revised version, I made adjustments to punctuation and sentence structure to enhance readability. Overall, your paragraph is well-written and effectively communicates your motivations and goals.
como puedo decir en inglés algo como "se que esto suena muy ambicioso"

Para decir "sé que esto suena muy ambicioso" en inglés, puedes utilizar la siguiente expresión:

"I know this may sound very ambitious."
another verb que no sea ambicioso
"I know this may sound overly ambitious."
synonyms

"I know this may sound excessively ambitious." 
"I know this may sound highly ambitious."
"I know this may sound extremely ambitious."
"I know this may sound remarkably ambitious."
synonym of ambitious

Alternative synonyms for "ambitious" include:

- Driven
- Determined
- Aspiring
- Goal-oriented
- Forward-thinking
- Enterprising
- Eager
- Zealous
- Striving
- Visionary
como digo "estoy convencida que soy una candidata apta para cursar este master, y que podré contribuir a la academia con preguntas en clase" en ingles y que suene profesional

I am confident that I am a suitable candidate for pursuing this master's degree, and I believe I can contribute to the academic environment by actively engaging in class discussions and posing thoughtful questions.

what do you think if this I am convinced that I am a suitable candidate for pursuing this master degree, that will contribute to the academic environment by actively engaging in class discussions and practical questions

Your revised sentence is well-written and professional. It effectively conveys your conviction of being a suitable candidate for the master's degree and highlights your commitment to actively participate in class discussions and pose practical questions. It emphasizes your readiness to contribute to the academic environment. Great job!
what would you improve

Your sentence is already well-written, but if you would like a slight improvement, you can consider the following revision:

"I am convinced that I am a highly qualified candidate for pursuing this master's degree, and I am eager to contribute to the academic environment by actively engaging in class discussions and posing insightful and practical questions."

In this version, I added "highly qualified" to emphasize your strong suitability as a candidate. Additionally, I replaced "thoughtful" with "insightful" to convey a deeper level of understanding and analysis in your questions. Lastly, I included "eager" to showcase your enthusiasm and motivation. This slight adjustment adds extra emphasis and nuance to your statement.
would yo combine this with the other parragraph idea?

Certainly! Here's a combined version of the two paragraphs:

"I am convinced that I am a highly qualified candidate for pursuing this master's degree, and I believe I can contribute to the academic environment by actively engaging in class discussions and posing insightful and practical questions. I know this may sound overly ambitious, but during my years of experience, I have been able to build a strong network of contacts and develop a comprehensive understanding of economics. However, to transform my vision into a concrete plan of action, I have decided to pursue a master's degree that will serve as a foundation to understand the complex issues that arise when legal frameworks interact with the economic factor. This degree will not only enrich me academically with new methodologies and study practices but also allow me to explore different cultures, thus expanding my vision of the world and the cultural contexts that inhabit it. All of these characteristics are what I have observed in the EMLE program, a comprehensive program that meets my professional and personal expectations. I am confident that it will provide me with the foundations necessary to reach my professional goal: to bring corporate law in Ecuador to a more sustainable place."

This version combines the ideas from both paragraphs while maintaining a coherent flow. It emphasizes your confidence in being a qualified candidate, your ambition, and your decision to pursue a master's degree to further your goals. It also highlights your belief in the EMLE program's ability to meet your expectations and help you achieve your professional aspirations.
